strengths: Proven experience building complex software systems across multiple domains and technologies, including AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven architectures
Demonstrated ability to scale and lead engineering teams, with experience in developing internal technical leadership and governance frameworks
Strong background in fintech-adjacent technologies and experience with regulated environments, with a history of delivering scalable and reliable software systems
concerns: Lack of direct experience as a CTO or in an executive leadership role, with most experience being as a senior software developer or staff engineer
No explicit mention of experience with agentic AI frameworks like LangGraph or production experience with multi-agent AI systems in a fintech context
Limited visibility into experience with foundation models, LLM infrastructure, and AI-system reliability metrics
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has a strong technical background with experience in complex software systems and AI-agent infrastructure. He has demonstrated ability to scale engineering teams and develop technical leadership, which are key requirements for the CTO role.
